name: TexasWorm.io
author: Poki
description: Are you ready to become a colossal, wild worm and take over a bustling western village? Devour everything in your path, including the unsuspecting residents, to grow massively! Battle other worms by colliding with them, but beware—you can take damage too! Stay vigilant for speeding trains that can squash you in an instant. Customize your worm with unique skins, transforming into anything from a menacing serpent to a vibrant, green snake. If you love games like slither.io and wormax.io, you'll be hooked on this thrilling new twist! Climb the leaderboard and prove your dominance in the Wild West! Join the frenzy now and see if you have what it takes to become the ultimate worm overlord! What are the abilities? Magnet: This scoops up everything in it's radius. Speed up: This ability speeds up your worm by 2x! How to play TexasWorm.io? Mouse: Move the worm around Who created TexasWorm.io? TexasWorm.io is created by OnRush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io , Eat the world , Shipo.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , Burger Bounty , MagicLand.io How can I play TexasWorm.io for free? You can play TexasWorm.io for free on Poki. Can I play TexasWorm.io on mobile devices and desktop? TexasWorm.io can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
